seo.privacyDescription: Shipping, returns, and privacy policies for AnimeHubs. Learn how we handle orders and your personal data.
seo.aboutDescription: Meet the person behind AnimeHubs. Hand-picked anime collectibles from Japan, based in Uppsala, Sweden.

privacy.title: Policies
privacy.intro: This page covers our shipping, return, and privacy policies. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us via Instagram.
privacy.section1Content: We deliver to addresses within Sweden. A flat shipping fee of 45 kr applies to all delivery orders. Orders over 599 kr qualify for free shipping. For Meet & Buy orders, no shipping is required — pickup is arranged in the Uppsala area. Shipping times vary but are typically 2–5 business days.
privacy.section2Content: We accept returns within 10 days of the payment date. Items must be unused and in their original packaging. To request a return, contact us via Instagram DM. Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the buyer. Once we receive and verify the returned item, a refund will be issued to the original payment method. We do not offer direct exchanges — please return the item and place a new order instead.
privacy.section3Content: AnimeHubs operates in Uppsala, Sweden. For questions about your personal data, contact us via Instagram.
privacy.section4Content: When you place an order, we collect your name, email address, and shipping address (for delivery orders). We also use cookies for essential site functionality.
privacy.section5Content: Your data is used solely for processing orders and sending confirmation emails. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.section6Content: Order data is kept for up to 12 months after the order date, after which it is deleted.
privacy.section7Content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your personal data. You can also object to processing. Contact us via Instagram to exercise these rights.
privacy.section8Content: We use essential cookies for site functionality (e.g., cart data, language preference). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.section9Content: We may update these policies from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.

about.heroSubtitle: Your local anime goods shop in Uppsala, Sweden
about.storyParagraph1: AnimeHubs was started by two Japanese people living in Uppsala, Sweden, with a simple wish — to share the world of Japanese anime with more people here.
about.storyParagraph2: Sweden has a wonderful culture of caring about interior design and making living spaces feel personal. We'd love for Japanese anime to become part of that — bringing unique, beautifully crafted goods into your home.
about.storyParagraph3: We hope you'll enjoy the incredible craftsmanship and design that Japanese anime goods have to offer!
about.commitmentsSubtitle: Three things we care about most when bringing anime goods to you.
about.commitment1Description: All our items are sourced directly from Japan. We hunt through second-hand shops and specialty stores to find quality pieces at great prices.
about.commitment2Description: We stock popular anime goods, but if there's something specific you're looking for, just send us a message — we'll do our best to find it for you.
about.commitment3Description: Every item is one-of-a-kind. You can inspect items in person before purchasing, so you know exactly what you're getting.
about.locationDescription: AnimeHubs is based in Uppsala, Sweden. We offer local pickup in the Uppsala area as well as delivery across Sweden. For local pickups, we meet at a public location for your convenience and safety.
about.ctaDescription: Feel free to reach out via Instagram DM or email — we're happy to help with questions about products, orders, or anything else.

cookie.message: We use essential cookies to make this site work. No tracking cookies are used.
